reviews.comment:
Siempre paso. Buena cocina. Buen desayuno. La atención es excelente.  No me gusta como parada para dormir de noche, pero es un lugar recomendable.

Acá estamos otra vez de regreso y como siempre 26/7/25 , a comer  y dormir en ACA R TALA.  Muy bien atendidos. Y nos quedamos a dormir ... gracias gente

(Translated by Google)
I always stop by. Good food. Great breakfast. The service is excellent. I don't like it as a place to stop for the night, but it's a highly recommended place.

We're back again, and as always, on July 26, 2025, we're eating and sleeping at ACA R TALA. Very well looked after. And we stayed the night... thanks, guys.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por su comentario, lo esperamos nuevamente

reviews.comment:
Muy mal servicio en el shop. El malhumor de la empleada indescriptible. No realizó los descuentos por la app del ACA Y de YPF. El baño impecable y la señora super amable.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service at the store. The employee's bad temper was indescribable. She didn't offer discounts through the ACA or YPF app. The bathroom was spotless, and the lady was super friendly.
